variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.service
| filter isNotNull(belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace])
| fields id, Service = entity.name, namespace = belongs_to[dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace]
| expand namespace
| fieldsAdd namespace = entityName(namespace, type:"dt.entity.cloud_application_namespace")
| fields Service
| dedup Service
| sort Service

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter in(entity.name, array($Service))
| dedup id
| fields id
| limit 50

timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage),
           by: {dt.entity.process_group_instance,
                dt.entity.process_group}
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.service = entityAttr(dt.entity.process_group, type:"dt.entity.process_group", "runs")
| fieldsAdd dt.entity.service = dt.entity.service[dt.entity.service]
| filter in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields dt.entity.process_group_instance

0.content:
## 🔧 Developer Self-Service Dashboard
One-click access to **service health**, **Davis AI problems**, **distributed traces**, **exceptions**, **key request endpoints** and **resource saturation** for your services.

**TO START:** Select the services you own from the **Service** dropdown above. All tiles auto-populate. **Use Open-With > Davis CoPilot** on any Exception or Log to get AI-powered root cause analysis!

1.query: data record(a="SERVICE HEALTH: Open a Service, Analyze Failed Spans, or view Service Failure Analysis")

2.query:
timeseries {latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99),
           requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count)},
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| lookup [ timeseries http_5xx = sum(dt.service.request.count,default: 0.0),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: (http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599) and
                   in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))],
            sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:dt.entity.service, prefix: "http5xx."
| lookup [ timeseries http_4xx = sum(dt.service.request.count,default: 0.0),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: (http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499) and
                   in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))],
            sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:dt.entity.service, prefix: "http4xx."
| lookup [fetch dt.davis.problems
  | filter event.status=="ACTIVE" and dt.davis.is_duplicate==false
  | expand affected_entity_ids
  | summarize {Problems = countDistinct(display_id), event.id = takeFirst(event.id), event.kind = takeFirst(event.kind)},
    by:{affected_entity_ids}],
  sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:affected_entity_ids,
  fields:{Problems, affected_entity_ids, event.id, event.kind}
| fieldsAdd Latency_p50 = arrayAvg(latency_p50),
            Latency_p90 = arrayAvg(latency_p90),
            Latency_p99 = arrayAvg(latency_p99),
            Requests = arraySum(requests),
            Errors = arraySum(errors),
           `5xx` = arraySum(http5xx.http_5xx),
           `4xx` = arraySum(http4xx.http_4xx)
| fieldsAdd `Failure Rate` = (Errors/Requests) *100
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| fieldsAdd `Analyze Service` = concat("[", Service, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", dt.entity.service, "&detailsFrom=",$dt_timeframe_from,"&detailsTo=",$dt_timeframe_to,")")
| fields
    Status = if(`Failure Rate` >= 2.00, "🔴", else: "🟢"),
    Service,
    `Analyze Service`,
    dt.entity.service,
    Requests,
    `Failure Rate`,
    Errors,
    `5xx` = concat("[",if(isNull(`5xx`), 0, else:`5xx`),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+http.response.status_code+%3E%3D+500+AND+http.response.status_code+%3C%3D+599&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"),
    `4xx` = concat("[",if(isNull(`4xx`), 0, else:`4xx`),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+http.response.status_code+%3E%3D+400+AND+http.response.status_code+%3C%3D+499&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"),
    Latency_p50,
    Latency_p90,
    Latency_p99,
    event.id,
    event.kind,
    `Failed Spans` = if(`Failure Rate` > 0, concat("[📉Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+request.is_failed+%3D+true&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"), else: ""),
    `Service Failures` = if(`Failure Rate` > 0, concat("[📊Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/failure-analysis?filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+&tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,")"), else: "")
| sort `Failure Rate` desc
| filterOut matchesPhrase(Service, "background threads") or matchesPhrase(Service, "Health") or matchesPhrase(Service, "SpringBoot") or matchesPhrase(Service, "on port")

3.query: data record(a="PROBLEMS: Open Problem or Root Cause Service")

4.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter dt.davis.is_duplicate == false
| sort timestamp desc
| expand affected_entity_ids
| filter in(affected_entity_ids, array($ServiceID)) or in(affected_entity_ids, array($PGI))
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.services"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.process_group_instance], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.pgi"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.application], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.applications"
| lookup [fetch dt.entity.host], sourceField:affected_entity_ids, lookupField: id, prefix:"lookup.affected.entity.hosts"
| summarize {
    startTime = takeFirst(event.start),
    endTime = takeFirst(event.end),
    problemClosedDuration = takeFirst(resolved_problem_duration),
    status = takeFirst(event.status),
    event.name = takeFirst(event.name),
    rootCause = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_name),
    rootCauseEntityId = takeFirst(root_cause_entity_id),
    affectedServices = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.servicesentity.name),
    affectedPGI = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.pgientity.name),
    affectedApplications = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.applicationsentity.name),
    affectedHosts = collectDistinct(lookup.affected.entity.hostsentity.name),
    event.id = takeFirst(event.id)
  },
  by:{display_id, event.kind}
| fieldsAdd currentTime = toTimestamp(now())
| fieldsAdd Description = concat(display_id, " - ", event.name)
| fields
    Status = status,
    Description = concat("🔥[", Description, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.davis.problems/problem/", event.id, ")"),
    Affected = arrayRemoveNulls(arrayConcat(affectedApplications, affectedServices, affectedPGI, affectedHosts)),
    RootCause = if(isNotNull(rootCause),
      concat("[", rootCause, "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?detailsId=", rootCauseEntityId, "&detailsFrom=", startTime, "&detailsTo=", endTime, ")"),
      else: ""),
    StartTime = startTime,
    EndTime = if((status == "ACTIVE"), "In Progress", else: if((status == "CLOSED"), endTime)),
    Duration = if((status == "CLOSED"), problemClosedDuration, else: if((status == "ACTIVE"), currentTime - startTime)),
    event.id,
    event.kind
| sort StartTime desc

6.title: Requests
6.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| limit 100

7.title: Requests - Success vs Failed
7.query:
timeseries total = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           failed = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count, default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fieldsAdd success = total[] - failed[]
| fields timeframe, interval, success, failed

8.title: Requests - Key Endpoints
8.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{endpoint.name},
           filter: endpoint.name != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS" and in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, endpoint.name, requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| limit 100

10.title: Latency_p50
10.query:
timeseries latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| limit 100

11.title: Latency_p90
11.query:
timeseries latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| limit 100

12.title: Latency_p99
12.query:
timeseries latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99),
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| limit 100

14.title: Failed Requests
14.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count, default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

15.title: 5xx Errors
15.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599 and in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

16.title: 4xx Errors
16.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter: http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499 and in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields timeframe, interval, service = entityName(dt.entity.service), errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

18.title: CPU Usage %
18.query:
timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
| fields timeframe, interval, process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance), cpu
| sort arrayAvg(cpu) desc
| limit 100

19.title: Memory Used
19.query:
timeseries memory = avg(dt.process.memory.working_set_size),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
| fields timeframe, interval, process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance), memory
| sort arrayAvg(memory) desc
| limit 100

20.title: GC Suspension Time
20.query:
timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.clr.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.go.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.entity.process_group_instance},
           filter: in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))]
| fields timeframe, interval, process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance), gc_time
| sort arrayAvg(gc_time) desc
| limit 100

21.query: data record(a="TRACES WITH EXCEPTIONS: Click on Endpoint to open Trace. Or use Open-With Davis CoPilot to explain Exception")

22.query:
fetch spans
| filter in(dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fieldsAdd Service = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| fieldsAdd exception.stacktrace = span.events[][exception.stack_trace]
| fieldsAdd exception.class = span.events[0][exception.type]
| fieldsAdd eventname = span.events[0][span_event.name]
| fieldsAdd exception.message = toString(span.events[][exception.message])
| fieldsAdd trace_id = toString(trace.id), span_id = toString(span.id)
| filter eventname == "exception"
| filter isNotNull(span.exit_by_exception_id)
| fields
    Time = start_time,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    Service,
    Endpoint = concat("[", if(isnull(endpoint.name), span.name, else: endpoint.name), "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse&sidebar=a%2Cfalse&filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+", dt.entity.service, "+AND+trace.id+%3D+",
      trace_id, "&traceId=", trace_id, "&spanId=", span_id, "&tf=", $dt_timeframe_from, ";", $dt_timeframe_to, "&pb=true", "&tt=", encodeUrl(toString(start_time)), ")"),
    ExceptionClass = if(isNotNull(exception.class), exception.class, else: "N/A"),
    ExceptionMessage = concat("🤖 ", if(isNotNull(exception.message), exception.message, else: "N/A")),
    Exception = if(isNotNull(exception.stacktrace), exception.stacktrace, else: "N/A"),
    Duration = duration,
    dt.entity.service,
    trace.id,
    span.id
| sort start_time desc
| limit 200
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Exception, Service and Endpoint and tell me how to fix the exception ", ExceptionClass, ":", ExceptionMessage), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(concat(Exception, " Service", Endpoint), to:20000)))

23.query: data record(a="LOGS WITH ERRORS: Use Open-With on a Log to Drill to the Trace — OR — Ask CoPilot to Explain it")

24.query:
fetch logs
| filter in(dt.entity.process_group_instance, array($PGI))
         and isNotNull(trace_id)
         and in(status, "WARN", "ERROR")
| parse content, "JSON:jsonContent"
| fields
    Time = timestamp,
    Status = status,
    timestamp,
    Content = if(isNull(jsonContent), content, else: jsonContent),
    Process = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance),
    Host = entityName(dt.entity.host),
    trace_id,
    span_id,
    `Trace Context` = if(isNotNull(trace_id), concat(endpoint.name, " [📉Analyze](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse&l=true&sidebar=a%2Cfalse&filter=trace.id+%3D+",
      trace_id, "&traceId=", trace_id, "&tf=", $dt_timeframe_from, ";", $dt_timeframe_to, "&pb=true", "&tt=", encodeUrl(toString(timestamp)), ")"), else: "no trace"),
    dt.source_entity
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 500
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Log and Stacktrace and explain what it means for my service and how to fix it ", Status, ":", Content), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(toString(Content), to:20000)))
